entry.title: Re: No transaction type assigned to bank acccount ING 0009156313
entry.content: Is this issue resolved? If yes, can you please mention the solution. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Free goods in purch Info record MM SAP S/4
entry.content:
Hi,

The below link has details of Free Goods process, can you please review, and I hope you will get your answer.

 

Steps of Free good Configuration - SAP Community

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SA...
entry.content:
Hi @bill_froelich ,

Please find the CAP service metadata below:

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...
entry.content:
Hi Gregorw,

I have checked the shared Documentation and executed some of the CLI commands, which was mentioned. However, all the deployment configurations for the UI along with the SAP Build Workzone launchpad module have been already added as part of the Fiori App Generator tool/templates. I have redeployed but no luck.

 

Thanks and Regards

MD Manauwar

entry.title: Re: FreeHand SQL query with input parameters
entry.content: @XaviPolo I just noticed another good point in your example: the parameter values should be in single quotes.

entry.title: Identity Directory API specification is broken
entry.content:
Hey there,

the Identity Directory API of the package SAP Cloud Identity Services is broken. When I try to use it with SAP Build Process Automation directly or also downloaded as JSON or YAML I get the following error:

Failed to fetch the artifact information: The API specification file is invalid. As the uploaded file specification format does not align with OpenAPI or CSDL specification standards.

In the browser it is working. Link: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/overview

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Type "Number" should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Katharina

When creating a field type "Decimal Number", with some decimal places and the default value [empty], there is no value.

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Datasphere to ADLS Gen2 Connectivity
entry.content:
@bheemeshRao Thanks for the detailed info on setting up connectivity between Datasphere and Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 using a Service Principal with a Certificate. It's really helpful! I just noticed you posted as a Q&A, but it would've been better as a blog post!

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Type "Number" should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Katharina

When creating via adaptation an extension field type "Decimal Number", with some decimal places and the default value [empty], there is no value. I do this in SAP Sales Cloud - i do expect that for Marketing Cloud it works the same.

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: 2503684 - SAP S/4HANA: new design of the views in CKM3 and the impact on BW/4HANA
entry.content: What is the impact of the new design on BW/4HANA? Does BW/4HANA need to be adapted, and if so, which adaptations are possible?

entry.title: Mexican CURP number and Tax ID are maintained under National ID number section in SF EC, but the
entry.content:
Dear Friends

We have replication error for Mexico where Mexican CURP number and Tax ID are maintained under National ID information section in SF EC but when data is replicating to SAP its considering the Tax number as National ID and throwing error "(2) Gender in CURP does not coincide. Must be (W)oman, not Q; Pernr 00011111: Infotype 0002 with error""

SF field nationalID is mapped to PERID in SAP

but when we remove Tax number and try replicating, its successful, but Client wants to maintain both Tax number and CURP national ID.

 

Is there a way we can maintain both in SF and replicate successfully.

 

Please help

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SA...
entry.content: I suspect you want to use "Composition of many Machines" instead of one since I plant would typically have zero, one or more machines.  Using of one restricts there to only being one machine ever at the plant and use of one is discouraged per the compositions CDL doc.  Please verify your use case and update accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
entry.content:
I have faced this :
Here is a check list
1) SAP Gateway service was not connected --> Was able to get hold of the problem, with that
Double-check that the SAP gateway service is running on the server. You can do this by checking the SAP Management Console or using transaction SMGW in the SAP GUI
2) Check your route configuration
3) ADT version is outdated

The reason can be many

entry.title: Re: How to delete a service organization in public cloud...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin,

If the Service Org has been activated (i.e., deployed to the Dev tenant), you cannot delete it. However, you can control not to transport this org info to Test and Production tenants.

I have an explanation on a similar question: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/experience-with-deleting-company-codes-before-go-live/qaq-p/13803676/comment-id/4842899#M4842899.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed on… - Approval date" in SAP Sales CDS view.
entry.content:
To create a custom report, we need to locate 2 specific fields from the CDS view tables from Sales apps. 

The fields requested are Last Changed On and Completed on… - Approval date, both fields are available in the My Outbox app, however I can't seem to find the correct view which contains these 2 fields.




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed...
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

One of the fields requested (Last Changed On) can be located in the I_SalesDocument CDS View, you can confirm this by accessing the SAP API Portal and searching for LastChangeDate.

 

The other field requested "Completed on… - Approval date" is more complex, this information is located in the WorkflowTask tables and you can find further details in the I_WorkflowStatusDetails CDS view, the field name is WrkflwTskCompletionUTCDateTime, both of them can be located in the API Portal link above.

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: S/4 Product Compliance - Label Management
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am currently exploring the new S/4HANA Product compliance solution as a possible fit for my client's requirements. Note we are implementing S/4HANA 2023, so please keep this in mind.

Specifically, I am looking at the new Product Compliance Label management solution, and want to get a better understanding of how it works. I have gone through in much detail the resources on help.sap.com which explains the concept very well. i.e. I understand that it relies on a third party partner to design and print the labels. 

So far, after reviewing the material and resources, the process as I understand it is as follows: 

1. create compliance requirement for labels

2. design label template using external partner solution (this replaces the old classic WWI approach). send template back to S/4 product compliance

3. assign compliance requirement and the label template to a label category in the label configuration app

4. assign configured label category to the product

5. validate and request print the label (using external partner) as and when needed.

Questions 🙂 

1. I reviewed the details of the label-specific compliance requirement that needs to be created, however, it does not seem to have much information in it other than the date format. I am just a bit unclear about how to assign the phrases and regulatory graphics to the compliance requirement. Do we create our own compliance requirement with these specific phrases and graphics?

2. Is the process similar to the safety data sheet process where we perform an assessment against the assigned compliance requirements that contain phrases and labels? 

3. For my benefit, would it be possible to briefly describe the end-to-end process from design of template all the way to print from a business process point of view?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the it...
entry.content:
Thanks, it works now.

 

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="item[TRANSTYPECODE = '']"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

I am having a problem with a formatted search in SAP B1 Hana

Table OPOR, I have a UDF    TRX_Expired
Table POR1, I have a UDF     TRX_Expired
I need a formatted search in OPOR to populate TRX_Expired with "Item Expired" if any lines in POR1 TRX_Expired = "Item Expired"

Example 1
     OPOR
     DocNum       TRX_Expired

     POR1
     DocNum        Item Code   TRX_Expired

     1234              ABC2            Item Expired

     1234              ABC2           (Empty)

Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: Send emails dynamically in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

Currently I am working on sending emails to multiple recipients using an XML payload defined as follows:

<EmpRecords>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>123</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Gopi</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>K</EmpLName>

     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>456</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Ram</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>C</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000</EmpSalary>

     </EmpRecord>

           <EmpFName>Mohammad</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>Khan</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test3@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
      <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>234</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Varnikai</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>L</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
            <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test4@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
</EmpRecords>

The test emails are:

test1@mail.com

test2@mail.com

test3@mail.com

test4@mail.com

However, I have not found a way to put the 4 emails coming from the payload into the email connector definition.

 

Is there a method to dynamically place emails that come from an XML Payload?

Thanks

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to enable the footers and use it in Master Form?

entry.title: How to get SAP GUI bit version through ABAP code?
entry.content:
Looking for a way how to get through ABAP code a version (32/64bit) of SAP GUI from user. Is there is a way via class CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES somehow?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get SAP GUI bit version through ABAP code?
entry.content:
There's no method for this.

An idea would be checking if registry node HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\SAPGUI64 and the values underneath it exist.

This only exists if a SAP GUI 64bit has been installed.

entry.title: Re: SQLITE_ERROR: no such table: localized_AdminService_Authors
entry.content:
Hi I know this is an old post but I am currently doing this same training project and I have the same issue. I'm surprised there isn't a more definitive solution 4 years later but I got it to work.

I have had this problem before on other frameworks and the problem lies in the package-lock.json file. Delete that file, do an 'npm install' and redeploy with 'cds deploy'. That should refresh the package-lock file and update it and work.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP project with persistent database: Error - missing localized_* tables
entry.content: Hi I know this is an old post but I am currently doing this same training project and I have the same issue. I'm surprised there isn't a more definitive solution 4 years later but I got it to work. I have had this problem before on other frameworks and the problem lies in the package-lock.json file. Delete that file, do an 'npm install' and redeploy with 'cds deploy'. That should refresh the package-lock file and update all the settings and work.

entry.title: Re: Rework Processing - Stock-Manufactured Material (BJN)...
entry.content:
Hi Georg,

You could manually assign the returned serial number(s) when creating the rework order via Menu > Header > Serial Numbers... Then you can post the consumption of returned FG126 with serial number and again the goods receipt with the same serial number as it is transferred from production order to goods receipt app. 

The rework processing can then be shown in the "Serial Number History" app - I skipped delivery to and return from customer - flow starting on the right with initial production order: 

If you don't need to record the serial number during rework processing in the ERP system you could think of an alternative process using a production order without consumption of the returned material or goods receipt (app "Production Order without Material - Create"). Here, you add only other materials which are required for rework processing in the production order component list but not the returned material. 

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...

entry.title: Re: SCORM file expiration
entry.content:
Hi Cris,

There's nothing built in that would make a content object expire as in making it automatically inactive or something of the like. There are content vendors that keep track of licenses and which users are using which content and can stop that content from working but that is not something that SF LMS manages or can report on.

entry.title: Re: Inactivate Ext Users are being assigned to a Course
entry.content: Hi Sally, manual deactivation does not clear the learning plan/assignments from the users so any changes to items, content, etc. will impact any users that has those assigned. When a user is made active but also assigned something, there is no job that would then check for delta changes since they were made inactive. Technically that is why if something is assigned via assignment profile and they are made inactive, the assignment profile will no longer associate them to the rules and that will reassign once they are active again if the assignment profile is still active.

In addition to my academic background, I have gained practical experience in business administration, which has equipped me with essential skills in data analysis, project management, and strategic decision-making.

For the Learning Journey Path, I have chosen SAP S/4HANA – Sales as I am eager to deepen my knowledge and expertise in this area, building on my existing skills and preparing for more advanced opportunities in the field.

I believe that participating in the Skills Initiative Program will provide me with valuable opportunities to enhance my skills and contribute to innovative projects within the SAP ecosystem.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of further discussing how I can contribute to and benefit from this initiative.

Sincerely,
Salish Kumar

entry.title: Re: Default BOL form for US?
entry.content:
The simple answer is it depends, In the case of deliveries there is a basic output type LD00 which is a combination of a packing slip and a bill of lading, to be honest it really can’t be used as a bill of lading without customization but it’s typically the template we all start with to develop either a packing slip or Bill of Ladings for a specific customer. They should be different documents.

If your using SAP shipments then you would use the CMR1 output type as the template for your bill of lading, again not a perfect but it’s intended as a starting point. In EWM there is a better template that works with TU’s that comes closer to the VICS BOL standard but you mentioned you were using SAP IM so you probably won’t use that. Below is a screen shot of the LD00 output before customization.

 

You have what you need to generate a BOL no other modules needed;  you just need them to create the BOL form you can use as SAP DOES NOT provide a Bill of lading out of the box.

Hope this helps.

thanks

entry.title: Re: Send emails dynamically in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Mario, 

To configure multiple email receivers we must pass all the email addresses separated by a comma (,) to the "To" field of the receiver mail adapter. 

Reference - Configure the mail receiver adapter 

Now assuming you have to send the same email content to all the possible email IDs that are present in the source XML payload, we would need to dynamically extract the email IDs, have them comma (,) separated and pass the value to the receiver Email Adapter's "To" field. 

Step 1 - Extract all possible receiver email addresses separated by comma (,) into a property.

To achieve this you can use a content modifier and extract the IDs using an xpath expression into a property -  - 
Property Name = receiverEmailID
Source Type = XPath
Source Value = string-join(//email/normalize-space(), ',')

For your XML payload, above step would update the property receiverEmailID with value - test1@mail.com,test2@mail.com,test3@mail.com,test4@mail.com

Step 2 - Configure the property value ${property.receiverEmailID} in the "To" field under processing for mail receiver adapter.

entry.title: Re: Reports - Image resolution : How to minimize file siz...
entry.content: If the image is saved as uncompressed BMP, then it doesn't matter what the source file size it, it'll just bloat the output PDF file. I printed a 40 page PDF and it came out to 122MB. Takes many minutes to generate the output file then its unusable to e-mail what should be a much smaller if handled optimally by the Crystal Engine.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to bulk upload test scripts to cloud ALM?
entry.content:
It appears there will be an SAP Cloud ALM Roadmap Item Planned for Q4/2024 for "Mass Upload of Test Cases". Link will be: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q3%202024;INNO=E78B0E4728D31EDDA1D30334BA2E361A 

While you are waiting, you might explore as a TEMPORARY workaround if "Creating Documents via Spreadsheet Upload" described via https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/documents-from-spreadsheets is a viable alternative to get you to Q4/2024. Otherwise, you will need to upload the Test Cases individually. 

Good luck and let us know how it turns out.

entry.title: Re: Migration of EHANA to Datasphere by leveraging Native HANA Cloud Instance of Datasphere Tenant
entry.content:
Thank you for your blog post, @Jinal_Patel . I'd like to offer some clarification from an SAP perspective regarding the migration process from SAP HANA EE to SAP Datasphere.

It's important to note that there isn't a direct migration path from SAP HANA EE to SAP Datasphere. Instead, the recommended approach for customers is to first adopt SAP HANA Cloud(DBaaS), rather than using the database tenant of SAP Datasphere. From there, customers can gradually extend/augment their SAP HANA Cloud implementation with SAP Datasphere to build a comprehensive business data fabric solution. The other option is to consider the greenfield adoption of SAP Datasphere.

When sizing SAP Datasphere, it's crucial to consider its use as a SaaS solution, not for utilizing its database tenant. Additionally, it's not accurate to assume that models can be directly lifted and shifted from HANA EE XSC to SAP Datasphere using the guide mentioned. The migration process is primarily intended for XSA-based scenarios or for SAP HANA Cloud(DBaaS), and SAP has recently released new BAS-based tooling to facilitate this transition. When you migrate packages to HDI-based,there are manual adjustments for all containers, and it is not a realistic solution to use the database of SAP Datasphere. Also, the transport and lifecycle mgmt. will be dual when you adopt this across landscapes and that adds to the complexity.

It's worth noting that there are significant limitations to using the underlying database of a SaaS solution like SAP Datasphere in the same way as SAP HANA Cloud (DBaaS). I've written a blog post exploring how customers can adopt certain native HANA features not directly accessible via DSP, such as Graph Engine usage, in specific scenarios.

For a more comprehensive understanding of the roadmap for transitioning from SAP HANA EE to SAP Datasphere, I recommend reaching out to the SAP Product Teams directly. @shabana  can provide the most up-to-date information and guidance on this topic.
